title: SCIM in HashiCorp Vault standardizes provisioning in platforms
summary: HashiCorp Vault 2.0 adds beta SCIM support, letting organizations standardize user and group provisioning from external identity platforms into Vault.

event_model_payload.headline: SCIM in HashiCorp Vault standardizes provisioning in platforms
event_model_payload.summary: HashiCorp Vault 2.0 adds beta SCIM support, letting organizations standardize user and group provisioning from external identity platforms into Vault.

title: Consul 2.0 improves flexibility, control, and scalability
summary: Consul 2.0 enhancements include multi-port for service mesh, CyberArk Workload Identity Manager, cluster rate limiting, and auto-scaling for API gateway.

event_model_payload.headline: Consul 2.0 improves flexibility, control, and scalability
event_model_payload.summary: Consul 2.0 enhancements include multi-port for service mesh, CyberArk Workload Identity Manager, cluster rate limiting, and auto-scaling for API gateway.

title: Encrypting large artifacts and streaming workloads with Vault
summary: Use Vault Transit with envelope encryption to securely protect large artifacts and streaming workloads without sending payloads to Vault.

event_model_payload.headline: Encrypting large artifacts and streaming workloads with Vault
event_model_payload.summary: Use Vault Transit with envelope encryption to securely protect large artifacts and streaming workloads without sending payloads to Vault.

title: Azure hub-and-spoke generally available for HCP Vault Dedicated
summary: Azure hub-and-spoke networking is now generally available in HCP Vault Dedicated, supporting enhanced cloud security maturity with private connectivity.

event_model_payload.headline: Azure hub-and-spoke generally available for HCP Vault Dedicated
event_model_payload.summary: Azure hub-and-spoke networking is now generally available in HCP Vault Dedicated, supporting enhanced cloud security maturity with private connectivity.
